scenario.name: IMS REGISTER
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[domain]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <[field0]>;expires=3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-IMS/[service] Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[domain]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <[field0]>;expires=3600 [authentication] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-IMS/[service] Content-Length: 0
